    @allure.story("黑名单CRUD")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-BLACK-001~004 拉黑→查询→移除→验证")
    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_blacklist_flow(
        self, community_api, user_user_id
    ):
        """拉入黑名单 → 查询验证 → 移除黑名单 → 查询验证移除"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        black_data = data["blacklist"]
        server_id = community["self_server_id"]
    
        # 前置清理：确保用户不在黑名单中（处理上次测试遗留的脏数据）
        with allure.step("前置清理：解除用户黑名单状态"):
            community_api.open_personal_server_black_list(
                user_id=user_user_id,
                server_id=server_id,
                list_type=black_data["list_type"],
            )
    
        # Step 1: 拉入黑名单
        with allure.step(f"将用户 {user_user_id} 拉入黑名单"):
            resp = community_api.add_personal_server_black_list(
                user_id=user_user_id,
                server_id=server_id,
                list_type=black_data["list_type"],
                reason=black_data["reason"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "拉入黑名单")
    
        # Step 2: 查询黑名单列表验证
        with allure.step("查询黑名单列表，验证包含用户"):
            resp = community_api.get_black_list(
                server_id=server_id,
                list_type=black_data["list_type"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
            _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询黑名单列表")
    
            black_list = result.get("retData", {}).get("list", [])
            user_ids = [str(item.get("userId", "")) for item in black_list]
>           assert str(user_user_id) in user_ids, \
                f"黑名单中未找到用户 {user_user_id}: {user_ids}"
